lineage: Median hourly pay = median annual salary / annual hours
Hours required = item price / median hourly pay

methodology.source_basis: Built from the annual reference dataset in prices-api.json and converted to monthly cadence using interpolation.
methodology.interpolation: For each adjacent annual datapoint, monthly values within the first year are generated using midpoint geometric interpolation (log-linear) when both values are positive; otherwise linear interpolation is used. Null values remain null. Final-year months are flat at the final annual value.
methodology.coverage: Monthly timeline spans 1950-01 through 2025-12 for every series and context denominator.
methodology.confidence: Direct monthly observations are not uniformly available over the full horizon; interpolation is used as a consistent aggregate method to create comparable monthly series.

schema.interpolation_policy: Midpoint geometric interpolation for positive values, linear fallback otherwise, with null-preserving behavior.
